creator: hiroto.kagotani@gmail.com
text:
foomatic-db creates a symlink in $PREFIX/share/cups/model dir
if CUPS is istalled, but installation from package does not create it.
This inhibits users from choosing foomatic PPD files in CUPS GUI.

How-To-Repeat: portupgrade -f -P foomatic-db
then you miss /usr/local/share/cups/model/foomatic-db-ppds symlink.
